items.title: Process Quality I
items.description: Hold an average process score of 60+ across 5 trades. The score grades the decision — stop, thesis, size, state of mind — never the outcome.

items.title: The Stop Works I
items.description: Let your stop take you out 2 times without widening or cancelling it. The exit you planned is the only one that protects the account you planned to keep.
